jalen duren.detail: Played 27 minutes but grabbed only 2 rebounds vs. a pick of over 6
jalen duren.web_narrative: Duren played 27 minutes but was held to just 2 rebounds, well below the over-6 target. No injury exit or DNP is indicated; the miss appears to be a performance outlier with no explicit explanation provided by sources.

james harden.detail: Played 37 minutes and posted a double-double (24 pts, 11 ast) in Game 4 win

jarrett allen.detail: Played 32 minutes and scored 9 points, narrowly missing over-10 prop; knee injury context noted from regular season but no mid-game exit reported
jarrett allen.web_narrative: Allen finished with 9 points in 32 minutes, just shy of the over-10 prop. While he was managing a lingering knee issue from late in the regular season, no mid-game exit or restriction was reported for this game.

lebron james.detail: Played 40 minutes with 3 assists vs. over-6 prop; hip injury from Game 2 noted but no exit in Game 4
lebron james.web_narrative: LeBron finished with only 3 assists against an over-6 prop despite playing a full 40 minutes. He appeared to aggravate a hip injury in Game 2 earlier in the series, which may have influenced his playmaking, but no mid-game exit was reported in Game 4.
